rootCause: The generic finish-requirement test treated BETA_PLACEHOLDER items as obtainable, so quests requiring placeholder-priced items could pass tests even when those items had no real acquisition path. The Wheel Encoder used by robotics/reflectance-sensors had no price and was not created by any process.
resolution: Make quest completable-item checks default to excluding BETA_PLACEHOLDER exemptions and explicitly run the finish-requirement test in strict mode; set a concrete Wheel Encoder price so it is buyable.
